About this item

  • [ ✅ Ultra-Compact Design & VESA Mountable ] The Blackview MP20 Mini PC measures just 10 x 10 x 3.5 cm and weighs a mere 265g (lighter than a bottle of water!). With its 0.32L minimal footprint, it’s the ultimate space-saver. The included VESA bracket allows you to mount it behind any monitor or TV for a clean, clutter-free desk setup. Features Auto Power On and RTC (Real-Time Clock) for timed shutdowns, so you can head to bed early while the Micro PC finishes your downloads—no more waiting, just pure efficiency.
  • [ 💻 Powering Your Productivity: Ryzen 3300U ] Experience seamless performance with the AMD Ryzen 3300U processor (up to 3.5 GHz). Featuring Radeon Vega 6 Graphics, the MP20 Mini Desktop PC outperforms entry-level chips like the N150/N100/N97/N95. It handles intensive multitasking and professional software with ease. Pre-installed with Win 11 Pro and supporting Linux/Ubuntu, it is the perfect engine for your home office, academic research, or business operations.
  • [ 🚀 16GB RAM & High-Speed Expandable Storage ] The Mini Computer Say goodbye to lag with 16GB of DDR4 RAM, allowing you to run over 30 Chrome tabs and multiple apps simultaneously. The 512GB M.2 SSD provides lightning-fast data access, with expansion support up to 2TB. Our advanced copper-tube cooling system with an ultra-silent fan (< 35dB) ensures the system remains cool and whisper-quiet even under heavy workloads, maintaining a peaceful environment.
  • [ 📊 4K UHD Multi-Display Productivity ] The Small PC Optimise data management and multitasking via dual HDMI + DisplayPort outputs. The MP20 pc desktop supports dual-screen configurations in 4K@60Hz, ideal for comparing reports, coding on one monitor, and viewing real-time previews on the other. This flexibility eliminates constant window switching, boosting inspiration and visual precision in any professional or creative field.
  • [ 🔀 Versatile Connectivity: Wired & Wireless ] The Desktop PC Enjoy total flexibility with Wi-Fi 5 and Bluetooth 4.2 for all your wireless peripherals. For mission-critical stability, the Gigabit Ethernet (RJ45) port offers maximum speed. With 9 built-in ports, including USB 3.2 (up to 10 Gbit/s), this Mini PC Computers is a versatile hub for work and entertainment. Perfect as a 4K HTPC (Home Theatre PC) for streaming Netflix, YouTube, and Disney+ in your lounge.
  • [ 📍 3-Year Warranty & Lifetime UK Support ] Buy with absolute peace of mind. Your Blackview MP20 Mini PC comes with a comprehensive 36-month hardware warranty—far exceeding the industry standard. Delivered quickly and securely via Amazon Logistics. We provide lifetime technical support for software updates and troubleshooting. Our dedicated team is always ready to ensure your device remains a reliable partner for years to come.

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

    Previous slide

    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    HTPC for the living room
    Purchased this primarily as an HTPC for the living room. It handles 4K streaming on Netflix and YouTube without any stuttering. The dual HDMI/DP ports are handy, and it was a doddle to connect my wireless keyboard. It’s so small it just disappears into the TV unit. Much better and more versatile than a standard TV stick. Five stars from this user, because for me, it lives up to the description listed on Amazon. I hope anyone that reads this and buys one, finds the same satisfaction I have. I took a chance on the mini as opposed to going back to a cumbersome tower and all that, and I am a happy camper so far. Longevity? Only time will tell, as with all and anything electronic.
    MoreHide

      5.0 out of 5 stars Worth every penny
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 29 November 2025

      The media could not be loaded.

    • Henry Budgett
      5.0 out of 5 stars Bargain!
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 14 October 2025
      Verified Purchase
      Destined for use as a 'kiosk PC' replacing a 15-year-old Acer NetTop that can't go past Windows 10, this is never intended for anything other than browsing and light web-based office tasks. The specification for the price made it irresistible (we have other Blackview devices and mini PCs so already trusted the brand) and so far it's performing perfectly.
      Runs silently, uses a 12v power pack (not mentioned in any of the documentation) which is a bonus as it means we can take it off-grid without needing an inverter, and is more than enough PC for the job it was bought for.
      One word of caution: it shipped with Windows 11 Pro 23H2 so we immediately updated it to a clean installation of 25H2 but neglected to backup the drivers first (we were warned, but ...) and lost WiFi connectivity. Contacting the support team got us a link to their Driver Manager package which fixed the WiFi issue and updated all the other drivers as well. I suspect we won't be the only people to need this but a definite thumbs up for the support team for a prompt response and a supplying really decent bit of software (nicer than many other vendor's driver manager and infinitely better than some of those dodgy 'free' ones which fill your machine with junk while not fixing the problem).
      Read more
      One person found this helpful
      Helpful
       Report

      5.0 out of 5 stars Small but quick
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 15 December 2025
      Verified Purchase
      The Blackview MP20 Mini PC was smaller than I had anticipated when it arrived but was easy to set up and is much faster than my old Windows 10 PC. The PC has operated flawlessly since set up a week ago and I'm very happy with it, Contact to extend my warranty was pretty straightforward so I'm now covered for any failures for 3 years instead of one at no extra cost.

    • annmac
      5.0 out of 5 stars Mini Computer - a huge positive step in technology.
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 23 November 2025
      Verified Purchase
      So far I'm very pleased with my Blackview Mini PC. I've not yet put it through all its paces due to time constraints. However I am impressed with the capacity of my new PC which equals my old 'tower PC' at a fraction of the size (4 x 4 x 1.5 inches - incredible). I'm happy with how it performs so far and look forward to testing it more. It has enough ports for my needs and can be extended using a USB hub, is very quiet, looks good and sits easily beside my monitor. So much better than my under the desk tower.
      Read more
      Helpful
       Report
    • David
      5.0 out of 5 stars Very impressed with the Blackview MP20 mini-PC
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 23 December 2025
      Verified Purchase
      So impressed with this. It arrived within 2-days and worked straight out of the box. I plugged in the power supply, attached the monitor, speakers, bluetooth dongle for my keyboard and mouse and turned on the mini PC. It booted quickly then went through the Windows set-up, quick took only a couple of minutes. After that each boot time was nice and quick, sooooo much quicker than my ancient desktop PC! Absolutely loving this mini-PC. I use it mainly for documents, the internet and watching videos and it hasn't let me down at all. It has good wifi but I plugged in the network cable, as my desk is right next to the router, so, why not? When the fan does kick in, it's almost silent., like a breath or a really quiet whisper. I can't fault this mini-PC at all and it takes up next to no space at all, I mean it's 4" square and about 2" deep. If you are hesitating about making the switch from a lumpy old behemoth of a desktop PC, just go ahead and buy it!
      Read more
      Helpful
       Report
    • BunnyP
      5.0 out of 5 stars Great price & fast setup for a Mini PC
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 6 September 2025
      Verified Purchase
      I bought a Blackview MP60 Mini PC two years ago; fast and reliable, still in use. Needed a second machine so bought this Blackview MP20 Mini PC. It's physically much smaller than the MP60, but very similar spec. and slightly faster processor. Very easy set up out of the box.
      I bought a tiny USB 1TB storage for each machine and used the enclosed brackets to attach the Mini PC box to the rear of my Samsung monitors. Saves on desk space! Very happy with the quality of the machines for the size and price!
      Read more
      BunnyP
      5.0 out of 5 stars
      Great price & fast setup for a Mini PC

      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 6 September 2025
      I bought a Blackview MP60 Mini PC two years ago; fast and reliable, still in use. Needed a second machine so bought this Blackview MP20 Mini PC. It's physically much smaller than the MP60, but very similar spec. and slightly faster processor. Very easy set up out of the box.
      I bought a tiny USB 1TB storage for each machine and used the enclosed brackets to attach the Mini PC box to the rear of my Samsung monitors. Saves on desk space! Very happy with the quality of the machines for the size and price!
      Images in this review

    Translate all reviews to English
    • Fred 59
      5.0 out of 5 stars très petit mais très puissant
      Reviewed in France on 18 December 2023
      Verified Purchase
      Concerne la version N97 - 16 Go DDR5 - SSD 500 Go
      Mini PC acheté pour remplacer un vieux PC de 10 ans qui servait à regarder la TV, naviguer sur le web, écouter de la musique, faire de la vidéo conférence.
      Ce qui étonne en premier c'est la taille, il est minuscule, il tient littéralement dans le creux de la main...
      La mise en route est très simple W11 pro est pré installé , la première mise en route prend 5 minutes.
      Le N97 qui est plus puissant que le N100 notamment sur la partie graphique permet tout les usages habituels sans broncher. Même les petits jeux tournent à la perfection (testé avec asphalt legend).
      Bien sur il ne fera pas tourner le dernier jeux AAA, mais ce n'est pas ce que l'on lui demande.
      On peut y brancher 3 moniteurs 4K à 60 Hz, donc parfait pour une station de travail ou un ordi d'étudiant
      Il peut également servir de stream machine dans le salon (bien que je préfère la Nvidia Shield pour cette usage) car il est très silencieux.
      Je l'ai accroché derrière mon écran grâce au support qui est fourni, du coup c'est invisible!
      En usage courant (video+web) il consomme entre 5 et 10 Watts, c'est à dire presque rien !
      Je vous conseille également de faire un petit tour dans le bios, le PC est équipé de DDR5, mais configuré pour de la DDR4, un petit changement de fréquence mémoire permet de gagner encore en puissance/réactivité (cherchez sur youtube avec la référence du PC il y a une vidéo en anglais qui teste ce PC et en parle).
      Bon au final, je suis très content de ce mini PC qui pourra servir à quasiment tout les usages, il ne chauffe pas, ne fait quasiment pas de bruit, reste à voir la fiabilité sur la durée...
      Read more
      Report
      Translate review to English
    • JM
      5.0 out of 5 stars Rendimiento excelente para su tamaño
      Reviewed in Spain on 2 June 2025
      Verified Purchase
      Buscaba un pequeño PC para tenerlo en casa como servidor multimedia y poder cacharrear sin necesidad de que ocupe mucho espacio ni gaste mucha luz, para mi uso me parece genial, lo veo una compra excelente.

      En la caja nos viene el ordenador con el extensor, el cable de alimentación y un cable HDMI, está hecho de plástico pero se nota de buena calidad y el extensor me parece ideal, te permite añadir un disco duro de 2,5' sin necesidad de cables ni nada, solo lo pones en la base y está listo para usarse.

      El rendimiento es muy bueno, lo tengo con un servidor PLEX y lo uso también para algún proyecto puntual conectado al router y se nota mucho mejor que los típicos atom y celeron de hace unos años, no te va a hacer falta potencia en ningún momento.

      Me parece también una opción ideal para la mayoría de personas que usan el ordenador para internet, ofimática Ocupa poco, consume poco y va fluido, se agradece además que tiene muchos puertos de todo tipo para no tener que depender de hubs.

      Sobre sonido, es totalmente silencioso cosa que se agradece, además viene con windows ya instalado para que sea solo encenderlo y listo para usarse.
      Read more
      JM
      5.0 out of 5 stars
      Rendimiento excelente para su tamaño

      Reviewed in Spain on 2 June 2025
      Buscaba un pequeño PC para tenerlo en casa como servidor multimedia y poder cacharrear sin necesidad de que ocupe mucho espacio ni gaste mucha luz, para mi uso me parece genial, lo veo una compra excelente.

      En la caja nos viene el ordenador con el extensor, el cable de alimentación y un cable HDMI, está hecho de plástico pero se nota de buena calidad y el extensor me parece ideal, te permite añadir un disco duro de 2,5' sin necesidad de cables ni nada, solo lo pones en la base y está listo para usarse.

      Report
      Translate review to English
    • Ines
      5.0 out of 5 stars Ein echter Allrounder – klein, leise, stark
      Reviewed in Germany on 3 June 2025
      Verified Purchase
      Ich habe mir den Blackview MP20 Mini PC zugelegt, weil ich nach einer kompakten, aber leistungsfähigen Lösung für meinen Arbeits- und Medienalltag gesucht habe – und ich wurde nicht enttäuscht. Der kleine Kasten ist mit dem Intel N150 ausgestattet, einem Quad-Core-Prozessor mit bis zu 3,6 GHz. Trotz seiner winzigen Größe liefert er im Alltag eine richtig flotte Performance. Office-Anwendungen, Videokonferenzen, sogar leichtes Bild- oder Videoschnitt – alles läuft flüssig. Die integrierte Intel UHD Grafik schafft problemlos 4K bei 60 Hz an zwei Monitoren gleichzeitig. Ich habe ihn über HDMI und DisplayPort parallel an zwei Displays gehängt, was perfekt fürs Multitasking ist.

      Die Geschwindigkeit beim Starten ust unschlagbar schnell: Dank der verbauten NVMe SSD mit 512 GB und 16 GB DDR4 RAM ist der Desktop in wenigen Sekunden einsatzbereit. Ich arbeite oft mit mehreren Programmen gleichzeitig, und bisher gab’s keinerlei Hänger oder Verzögerungen. Was ich richtig clever finde: Der Speicher lässt sich ganz einfach erweitern – entweder per interner 2,5-Zoll SSD/HDD (bis 2 TB) oder per externer USB-Festplatte. Das Gehäuse lässt sich werkzeuglos öffnen.

      Ich nutze den MP20 vor allem im Homeoffice und unterwegs. Mit seinen 265 Gramm ist er leichter als mein Handy und passt sogar in die Jackentasche. Mit der mitgelieferten VESA-Halterung habe ich ihn unsichtbar hinter dem Monitor montiert – mein Schreibtisch sieht dadurch super clean aus. Windows 11 Pro war schon installiert, lief sofort – Plug & Play im wahrsten Sinne. Ich war in unter einer Minute startklar.

      Interessanter Nebeneffekt: Ich habe den Mini PC auch als kleine NAS-Lösung im Netzwerk eingebunden – für Backups, Medien-Streaming und als private Cloud. Für meine Bedürfnisse reicht das völlig aus, und ich spare mir die Anschaffung eines teuren NAS-Systems.

      Geliefert wurde das Gerät schnell und gut verpackt.

      Fazit: Für mich ist der Blackview MP20 ein echter Allrounder – klein, leise, stark, und dabei auch noch günstig. Egal ob Büro, Streaming, als Medienzentrale oder für unterwegs – der kleine Rechner macht einfach einen verdammt guten Job.
      Read more
      Ines
